description_long: This cake features a rectangular, multi-layered structure with three distinct tiers, each composed of rounded, loaf-like segments stacked neatly. The top surface is adorned with an assortment of small, spherical decorations in various colors, resembling fruit or candy, scattered across a smooth, tan-colored icing. The cake's exterior is uniformly finished, with each layer separated by a subtle horizontal line, suggesting a soft, spongy interior. The overall appearance is playful and inviting, with the colorful toppings providing a vibrant contrast to the neutral base. There are no visible candles or additional decorative elements beyond the spherical toppings. The cake is displayed without any visible plate, tray, or stand, resting directly on a flat surface.
description: A three-tiered rectangular cake with tan icing and colorful spherical decorations on top, featuring rounded loaf-like segments and a smooth finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the stacked, rounded segments and colorful spherical toppings concentrated on the top surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated, rounded segments and the distribution of the spherical decorations across the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the uniform stacking of the tiers and a clear view of the colorful toppings, with less detail on the segment ends.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the rounded segments and the colorful spheres, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
